## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and align on the implementation approach for the Analytics feature in Atlas, focusing on SEO and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Analytics feature UI is mostly complete, with fake data in development; next step is implementing daily data fetching and storage](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Decided to move away from using pipelines, instead implementing workflow monitoring logic directly in Atlas for flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) is becoming a core focus, with potential for a separate freemium app in the future](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Need to implement more detailed views and filtering options similar to Google Search Console interface](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

## Topics

### Analytics Implementation Progress

  - [UI for Analytics feature is largely complete, including menu items and basic charts](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [Currently using fake data in development environment](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [Next major step: implement daily data fetching from Google Search Console API and storage in the database](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)

### Data Model and API Integration

  - [Created two models: AnalyticsSearchPage and AnalyticsSearchQuery](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [Using a Google Cloud service account for API access](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
  - [Considering future implementation of separate credentials per client for better isolation](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [Current API limits (1,200 queries per minute) deemed sufficient for now](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)

### User Interface Enhancements

  - [Need to implement date filtering options (24 hours, 7 days, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
  - [Planning to add tabs for top queries and top pages](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [Aim to recreate key functionalities of Google Search Console interface, including detailed views and filtering options](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)

### GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) Focus

  - [GEO becoming a core feature, with potential for a separate freemium app](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Observed rapid ranking improvements (within an hour) for AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [Planning to integrate GEO analytics with content creation and optimization features](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)

### Workflow and Pipeline Changes

  - [Decided to move away from using pipelines for data fetching](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Will implement generic workflow monitoring logic in Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [This approach allows for more flexibility and easier integration of various features](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Eliminate pipeline usage and implement workflow monitoring logic directly in Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=2330.0)
  - [Create views for pages and implement field filtering options](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=1989.0)
  - [Enhance UI to match key functionalities of Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
  - [Investigate and potentially implement more detailed analytics features (e.g., bounce rates from Google Analytics)](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)
  - [Continue development of GEO features and integration with existing content tools](https://fathom.video/share/-DzW1geYM6GbTdWtZkAGYDBtq6jqM7Lt?tab=summary&timestamp=2360.0)
